question_prompt: Q9: Would the following factors cause you to leave your current job?
panels: Q9: I would leave because of a lack of recognition or appreciation from management.
Q9: I would leave for a higher salary at another company.
Q9: I would leave for a more flexible work schedule.
Q9: I would leave for a more inclusive and diverse workplace.
Q9: I would leave for better career growth opportunities.
Q9: I would leave if I felt that my skills were not being utilized effectively.
Q9: I would leave if a return-to-office mandate were enforced.
Q9: I would leave if my ethical standards clashed with company practices.
